function.outcome_justification: The canonical entity file 10_entities/cast/ida.md identifies the target as Ida Novak with alias ida. An exhaustive review of all nine channel transcripts in 60_outbox/channels found messages from Petra Novak, Renate Hofer, Miles Novak, Omar Haddad, Elena Weiss, Lukas Brenner, Sara Demir, Claudia Reiter, Nina Schreiber, Tobias Kern, and Hanna-related channel participation, but no message attributed to Ida Novak or alias ida in any transcript.
